text: Built a render-time-validated catalog for all 49 public feature IDs with source-checked meanings, inputs, outputs, access/cost, fallback semantics, extraction recipes, and 18 primary reference groups. Added catalog completeness to docs lint, renamed navigation to Features, and linked catalog from README, homepage, Start, and Concepts. Verified 58-page Quarto build, live extraction examples, rendered row count/citations, Ruff, and 49 release contracts.
